title: Web Development
shortDescription: Professional web solutions using PHP, Laravel, and WordPress.
description: We build robust, scalable web applications using industry-leading technologies. Our team specializes in PHP, Laravel framework, and WordPress CMS to deliver custom websites and web portals tailored to your business needs.

title: Full Stack Development
shortDescription: End-to-end development with React, Node.js, and modern tools.
description: Our full stack development service covers everything from intuitive React frontends to powerful Node.js backends. We create complete web applications with RESTful APIs, database integration, and cloud deployment.

title: Android App Development
shortDescription: Native and hybrid Android applications for your business.
description: We design and develop high-performance Android applications that engage users and drive business growth. From UI/UX design to Play Store deployment, we manage the entire lifecycle.

title: Digital Marketing
shortDescription: SEO, SMM, and online presence management for your brand.
description: Grow your online presence with our comprehensive digital marketing services including SEO, Social Media Marketing, Google Ads management, content marketing, and analytics reporting.

title: PHP Training
shortDescription: Comprehensive PHP training from basics to advanced concepts.
description: Our PHP training program covers everything from core PHP fundamentals to advanced topics like OOP, MVC architecture, Laravel framework, and database integration with hands-on projects.

title: Java Training
shortDescription: Core Java and Advanced Java training with real projects.
description: Master Java programming with our structured training program covering Core Java, Advanced Java (JDBC, Servlets, JSP), Spring Framework, and Hibernate ORM with placement support.

title: Python Training
shortDescription: Python programming from fundamentals to data science basics.
description: Learn Python programming with our comprehensive course covering core syntax, OOP, Django framework, and an introduction to data science with NumPy and Pandas.

title: WordPress Development & Training
shortDescription: Build and manage WordPress websites with expert guidance.
description: We offer both WordPress development services and training programs covering theme development, plugin creation, WooCommerce, and SEO optimization.

title: Oracle Database Training
shortDescription: Comprehensive Oracle Database administration and SQL training.
description: Our Oracle Database training covers SQL fundamentals, PL/SQL programming, database design, stored procedures, triggers, and performance tuning.

title: IT Placement Support
shortDescription: 100% placement assistance for IT graduates and trainees.
description: Our dedicated placement support program helps students and fresh graduates secure their first IT job through resume building, mock interviews, and direct placement in partner companies.
